metadata.title: もろびとこぞりて
metadata.subtitle: Hark the Glad Sound! / Joy to the World (Antioch) — Japanese
metadata.composer: Lowell Mason (1792–1872), tune "Antioch" adapted from Handel's Messiah
metadata.lyricist: Philip Doddridge (1702–1751), "Hark the glad sound!" — Japanese translation by the editorial committee of 讃美歌 (1923), revised in 讃美歌 (1954)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original lyrics by Doddridge (d. 1751) and tune by Mason (d. 1872) are PD by > 150 years. Japanese translation by the 1923 讃美歌 editorial committee, with revisions in the 1954 讃美歌 (the form shown here). The 1923 committee members and the 1954 revision predate the 70-year post-mortem threshold for all contributing editors; Japanese Wikipedia treats this text as PD-cleared and quotes it in full
